title: RAG-PDF-Chatbot
subtitle: Production-Grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation
description: Upload PDFs and ask natural-language questions. Powered by a 5-stage retrieval pipeline with multi-query expansion, hybrid search, cross-encoder reranking, and real-time streaming.
overview: Built with FastAPI, LangChain, Qdrant vector DB, and GPT-4o. Features semantic chunking, BM25 + MMR hybrid retrieval, Redis-backed semantic cache, and SSE token streaming.

title: Agentic Chatbot
subtitle: Multi-Step Autonomous AI Agent
description: A production-grade agentic AI system using LangGraph StateGraph. Autonomously decomposes goals, executes tools (web search, data analysis), self-evaluates, and loops until satisfied.
overview: Built with LangGraph, FastAPI, OpenAI GPT-4o, Tavily Search API, and PostgreSQL. Implements Plan-Execute-Evaluate loop with conditional graph edges.

title: Career Lens
subtitle: AI-Powered Career Coaching Platform
description: Full-stack AI platform for job seekers: ATS resume scoring, skill gap analysis, and multi-turn mock interview coaching with real-time LLM inference.
overview: Built with FastAPI, LangChain LCEL, ChromaDB, Groq LLaMA 3.3 70B, and Google OAuth 2.0 JWT auth. Features RAG-powered resume analysis and stateful interview sessions.

title: ChromaDB Dashboard
subtitle: Zero-Dependency Browser Admin UI
description: A zero-dependency, single-file HTML admin dashboard (~60KB) for managing ChromaDB vector databases. Supports semantic search, metadata filtering, CRUD, and JSON export.
overview: Pure HTML5, Vanilla CSS3, and ES6+ JavaScript. No npm, no framework, no bundler. Talks directly to ChromaDB REST API v2 from the browser with a state-driven SPA architecture.

title: OneIDE
subtitle: Online Compiler & Coding Community
description: A full-stack multi-language online IDE supporting Python, Java, C, and C++. Includes a social coding community with groups, peer-to-peer code sharing, and an admin control panel.
overview: Built with Django 6.0, CodeMirror editor, PostgreSQL, and Gunicorn. Deployed on Render with 11 ORM models, 50+ URL routes, and SMTP email for password recovery.
